name: MinIO
description: The Object Store for AI Data Infrastructure
compose:
name: slashnode-minio
services:
  web:
    image: quay.io/minio/minio:RELEASE.2025-06-13T11-33-47Z
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    command:
      - server
      - /data
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: umbrel
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: $APP_PASSWORD
      MINIO_CONSOLE_ADDRESS: ':9011'
    volumes:
      - web_data-minio:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9011:9011
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-minio:
    name: slashnode-minio_web_data-minio
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (minio). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://min.io. Default login — user: "umbrel", password: "".
